name: copilot-chat-saver
description: Save and export GitHub Copilot chat history to Markdown and JSON files

commands.title: Copilot Chat Saver: Export All Chat History
Copilot Chat Saver: Export Latest Chat Session
Copilot Chat Saver: Open Output Directory
Copilot Chat Saver: Refresh Chat History Index

chatParticipants.name: history
chatParticipants.description: Search and recall past Copilot chat sessions. Ask questions with context from previous conversations automatically injected.

languageModelTools.name: copilotChatSaver_searchHistory
languageModelTools.description: Search the user's past Copilot chat sessions across all workspaces. Returns relevant context from previous conversations that match the query. Use this when the user references past work, asks 'how did I...', 'what was the fix for...', or needs context from previous sessions.

query.description: The search query — what topic or question to find in past chat history

maxResults.description: Maximum number of past sessions to return (default: 5)

copilotChatSaver.outputDirectory.description: Directory to save exported chat history. Defaults to ~/copilot-chat-exports/

copilotChatSaver.includeTimestamps.description: Include timestamps in exported chat history

copilotChatSaver.includeThinking.description: Include Claude thinking/reasoning blocks as collapsible sections

copilotChatSaver.includeToolCalls.description: Include tool call details (file reads, searches, edits)

copilotChatSaver.enableSimilarChats.description: Automatically detect new chat sessions and show similar past chats

copilotChatSaver.similarChatsMaxResults.description: Maximum number of similar past chats to show

copilotChatSaver.similarChatsMinScore.description: Minimum TF-IDF similarity score (0-1) for a past chat to be considered similar
